title: Cygnet: A Merged Multilingual Wordnet
description: Cygnet is a merged multilingual wordnet covering 40+ languages and ~180,000 concepts. It combines Open English WordNet, OMW Data, TUFS, OdeNet, DanNet, and several other wordnets into a single SQLite database, indexed by the Collaborative Interlingual Index (CILI).
references: Rowan Hall Maudslay & Francis Bond (2026). Cygnet: Refactoring the Open Multilingual Wordnet. In Proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2026).
